column2: NeuroCore Magnesium – Gentle Magnesium Glycinate for Energy, Muscles and Mind
column3:
NeuroCore Magnesium offers a highly absorbable form of magnesium designed to support your nervous system, ease muscle tension, and reduce daily fatigue. This gentle glycinate formula is well-tolerated by the digestive system and contributes to electrolyte balance, energy metabolism, and mental calm — ideal for restoring balance in high-stress routines.

What Is Magnesium Glycinate?

Magnesium Glycinate is a well-tolerated and highly absorbable form of magnesium, bound with the amino acid glycine to support optimal delivery. This chelated pairing enhances bioavailability, allowing magnesium to pass smoothly through the digestive tract and into the bloodstream, without the common laxative effects associated with other forms like magnesium oxide or citrate. Its gentle nature makes it a preferred choice for individuals with sensitive digestion, fatigue, or stress-related muscle tension.

Key Features

  • Bioavailable magnesium glycinate for superior absorption
  • Supports healthy nervous system function and psychological balance
  • Reduces anxiety, fatigue, and stress-related exhaustion
  • Ease muscle spasms and aches
  • Control blood sugar and electrolyte levels
  • Non-laxative and gentle on the stomach

Omega-3 Deficiency: A Common Gap in UK Diets

Despite widespread awareness of omega-3’s importance, only about one in three people in the UK consume the recommended two portions of oily fish each week. This dietary gap means many may be missing out on the heart, brain, and vision benefits that omega-3 fatty acids provide.

Omega Pure 3 offers a simple, effective way to bridge that gap. Each capsule delivers high-purity EPA and DHA the key omega-3s your body needs with added vitamin E to preserve oil freshness. Unlike traditional fish oils, Omega Pure 3 uses a refined capsule shell with a clean finish, helping reduce any unwanted aftertaste or reflux.

  • Regulates intestinal flora
  • Free from heavy metals and contaminants

column3:
Our Liposomal Omega-3 provides a high-purity fish oil rich in Docosahexaenoic Acid (DHA) and Eicosapentaenoic Acid (EPA), encapsulated in non-GMO sunflower phospholipids. Our Liposomal Delivery Technology provides a capsule-friendly, modern, membrane-like phospholipid format for premium omega-3 supplementation.

Omega-3 fatty acids, such as EPA and DHA, are long-chain polyunsaturated fatty acids that the body cannot make in sufficient amounts and must obtain from the diet. The primary dietary sources of these omega-3s are marine foods such as fatty fish and marine algae, while plant foods provide the shorter-chain omega-3 alpha-linolenic acid (ALA). EPA and DHA are incorporated into cell membrane phospholipids in tissues such as the heart, liver, immune cells, and nervous system. Within membranes, they are built into major phospholipids such as phosphatidylcholine and phosphatidylethanolamine, influencing how membrane lipids are organised and how embedded proteins are arranged. EPA and DHA also serve as precursors for families of locally acting lipid mediators, produced by enzymes such as cyclooxygenases, lipoxygenases, and cytochrome P450S.
column5: Health & Beauty > Health Care > Fitness & Nutrition > Vitamins & Supplements > Amino Acids

column3:
Our Liposomal Glutathione formula delivers clinically studied* Setria® Reduced L-Glutathione, encapsulated in non-GMO sunflower phospholipids. Our Liposomal Delivery Technology provides a capsule-friendly, modern, membrane-like phospholipid format for premium glutathione supplementation.

Glutathione is a small molecule that cells build from three amino acids and keep at relatively high levels inside many tissues. Inside cells, it cycles between reduced and oxidised forms, using a reactive sulfur atom to engage in reversible redox reactions and temporary links with proteins. Families of glutathione-dependent enzymes use this tripeptide in red blood cells, liver, lungs, gut, brain and immune cells to carry out local redox and conjugation chemistry. These tissue-specific glutathione systems operate alongside other redox-active molecules such as vitamin C in fluids and vitamin E in membranes.

*Clinically studied Setria® reduced glutathione was the subject of a six-month randomised, double-blind, placebo-controlled trial in healthy adults (Richie et al., 2015, European Journal of Nutrition), in which daily supplementation was associated with measurable dose and time-dependent changes in glutathione-related blood markers and was well tolerated.

column3: Our Liposomal Iron delivers Ferrous Fumarate in non-GMO phospholipid encapsulation, providing this Liposomal Delivery Technology in a capsule-friendly format. Iron is an essential mineral, meaning it must be obtained through the diet. Within cells, iron is incorporated into haem and iron– sulfur (Fe–S) clusters that are assembled predominantly in mitochondria. These cofactors are integral to numerous enzymes, including components of the respiratory chain, dehydrogenases, and enzymes involved in DNA synthesis and repair, and they are found in many tissues, such as liver, muscle, brain, and bone marrow.

column3: Our Liposomal Vitamin D3 + K2 Liquid provides both of these two fat-soluble vitamins, which are often formulated together for convenience.
